title: lodhra obtusa
intro: Lodhra obtusa, also known as Symplocos racemosa or Indian alstonia, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Lodhra obtusa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its traditional use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lodhra obtusa include its ability to treat menstrual disorders, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lodhra obtusa include decoctions, powder, and ointments that are often used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health issues.
